original_sources.evidence: Only an existing type-2 hex sends PacketAspectPlaceToServer with a null aspect, so empty hexes and anchors are not clearable.
The table requires usable ink, rolls Expertise/Mastery refund, writes an empty type-0 entry and consumes one ink for the accepted clear.
RESEARCHER1 refunds below 0.25 and RESEARCHER2 below 0.50; creative mode is not an unconditional refund branch.
